v2.3.0 feat: map expansion and cleanup meow meow~ ground is now 2000x2000 nyaa~ world bounds expanded to 800 units, initial structures reduced and spread way out, added structure cap (max 60) and far-culling so da map stays breathable uwu 🌍💕
v2.2.2 chore: added smol Object.assign guard script so da cursed THREE.js non-writable position crash cant happen again nyaa~ prebuild check now yeets da build if anyone tries dat evil pattern uwu 🐾💕
chore: rebuild dist/ [skip ci]

v2.2.1 fix: black screen was Object.assign on THREE.Mesh position/rotation nyaa~ THREE.js r183 defines those as non-writable so strict mode ES modules threw TypeError meow meow~ changed to .position.set() and .rotation.set() uwu 🐱💕
chore: rebuild dist/ [skip ci]
